2026-03-30GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityCanada - Ukraine on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters ** Agreement ** Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between Canada and Ukraine on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters.N/A
subject: Canada - Ukraine on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters ** Agreement **
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between Canada and Ukraine on Mutual Administrative Assistance in Customs Matters.
